sessions.intent: Design the removal of the GoalCall C# type so goal invocation flows through a single goal.call path.

before.assumptions: GoalCall overlaps Goal on identity and carries unrelated concerns (event context, Parallel tool flag, the four-tier resolution). Arguments were thought to need a place on the reference.
before.risk: Naive merge onto Goal would break the shared/stateless definition. ~30 production call sites reference GoalCall; events and llm-tools have hitchhiking concerns.

actions.context: Read the incumbent GoalCall, Goal, the goal.call handler, RunGoalAsync, and the event plumbing (Events.cs, IEvent.cs, event/on.cs, binding) to ground the design.

Wrote the spine (Why, settled design, actor/CurrentActor correction, data flow, stage index) and the full leaf-trace of ~30 production call sites bucketed by disposition (delete / rename-move / retype / reroute / events / catalog). Decisions: goal.call carries Parameters; app.Goal.Load owns resolution; app.Run runs; Event/IEvent deleted with %!event% moved to the firing path; Start delegates through goal.call(Actor:User); no escape hatch.

after.status: Design settled and written. Stage files not yet carved — awaiting Ingi's read-over and his answer on stage granularity.
after.notes: Branch created from origin/runtime2. Plan references verified against runtime2 (lazy params use .Value property on this branch). Coordinate with tools-as-actions branch on where Parallel lands.
